rationale: The cited paper appears in a single grouped citation used to support a broad background claim that consumers rely on imperfect marketplace cues when judging quality. The citing article does not discuss Janiszewski and Van Osselaer (2000)'s connectionist model, brand-quality learning mechanism, or branding implications in its theorizing, hypotheses, design, or interpretation. Because the reference serves only as general prior literature context without a distinct functional role, this is a mention-only citation.
